page: Amazon Web Services r8idb.48xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance featuring dedicated Intel x86_64 processors. It is equipped with 192 virtual CPUs derived from 96 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled at 2.0 threads per core. The processors operate at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. The instance is provisioned with 1536.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU.

This server configuration includes 11400 GB of local NVMe SSD instance store volumes, providing high-capacity, low-latency local storage directly attached to the hypervisor. Networking capabilities are supported by a baseline network bandwidth of 200 Gbps, managed via the AWS Nitro hypervisor. There are no graphics processing units included in this hardware profile.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the r8idb.48xlarge offers high resource density by combining large memory capacity with substantial local NVMe storage and high-speed networking on a single dedicated instance. This configuration is designed for memory-intensive and I/O-heavy workloads. Appropriate applications include large-scale relational and non-relational databases, in-memory caching layers, enterprise resource planning systems, and real-time data analytics pipelines.
description: Amazon Web Services r8idb.48xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance powered by dedicated Intel x86_64 processors running at 3.9 GHz. The system features 192 vCPUs across 96 physical cores, supported by 1536.0 GB of system memory. For local storage, the instance includes 11400 GB of NVMe SSD instance store volumes, managed under the Nitro hypervisor. It delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 200 Gbps, with no integrated GPU hardware. This high-density resource profile is designed for memory-intensive and storage-heavy workloads, offering a qualitative balance of compute, massive memory, and high-speed local storage. The r8idb.48xlarge is suited for large-scale database deployments, in-memory data stores, and intensive data processing applications.
og_description: Amazon Web Services r8idb.48xlarge is a memory-optimized server with 192 vCPUs, 1536 GB RAM, 11400 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, and 200 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for large-scale database workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized x86_64 server featuring 1.5 TB of RAM, 11.4 TB of local NVMe SSD storage, and 200 Gbps baseline networking.

1536.0 GB of system memory for memory-intensive applications
11400 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD instance storage
200 Gbps baseline network bandwidth via the Nitro hypervisor
Designed for large-scale databases and in-memory data processing
